narrative:
Washington Township has 48,657 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
